source.scope: Official-source-backed Andorra calendar-year 2026 standard resident general-income schedule using the EUR 24,000 personal minimum.

AD.notes: Standard resident general-income schedule with the EUR 24,000 personal minimum and effective 0%, 5% and 10% bands. Enhanced personal reductions, savings income and other deductions remain outside scope.

register.coverageSummary: Calendar-year 2026 standard resident general-income IRPF on caller-confirmed net income before the standard personal minimum.
